Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment On Default
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Tim Chan, an individual, Carrera VII, a California limited partnership and Manta Ventures, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Brian A. Barnhorst, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Rade Drmanac, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Barnhorst and Drmanac appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Tim Chan, an individual, Carrera VII, a California limited partnership or Manta Ventures, a California limited liability company.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed September 13, 2018.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendants Tim Chan, an individual, Carrera VII, a California limited partnership and Manta Ventures, a California limited liability company, occurred on March 5, 2019, and was effectuated on March 15, 2019.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Seth Stonin, an individual, and Carrera VII(b), a California limited partnership, was filed on August 22, 2020.
Default as to defendants Tim Chan, an individual, Carrera VII, a California limited partnership and Manta Ventures, a California limited liability company, was entered on August 22, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed via oral motion by counsel today, October 8, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Rade Drmanac, and against the defaulted defendants Tim Chan, an individual, Carrera VII, a California limited partnership and Manta Ventures, a California limited liability company, JOINT & SEVERALLY, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $250,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $106,433.46.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $2,037.65.

Total - $358,471.11.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
